things.name: Eiffel Tower
things.description: Gustave Eiffel's iconic iron lattice tower, the most visited paid monument in the world

things.name: Louvre Museum
things.description: World's largest art museum housing the Mona Lisa and 35,000 other works

things.name: Notre-Dame Cathedral
things.description: Masterpiece of French Gothic architecture undergoing restoration after the 2019 fire

things.name: Musee d'Orsay
things.description: Impressionist and Post-Impressionist masterpieces in a stunning Beaux-Arts railway station

things.name: Palace of Versailles
things.description: Opulent royal palace and formal gardens, symbol of the absolute monarchy of the Ancien Regime

things.name: Sacre-Coeur Basilica
things.description: Gleaming white Romano-Byzantine basilica atop the Montmartre hill

things.name: Champs-Elysees
things.description: World-famous avenue from the Arc de Triomphe to the Place de la Concorde

things.name: Centre Pompidou
things.description: Revolutionary inside-out building housing France's national museum of modern art

things.name: Musee Rodin
things.description: Sculptor's former mansion displaying The Thinker and The Kiss in beautiful gardens

things.name: Sainte-Chapelle
things.description: Gothic royal chapel with 15 enormous stained-glass windows covering 600 square metres
